KnockoutRichesPayoutAndRulesShared.BodyStackingSymbolsFeature1: During any spin with 3 or more rounds, the Stacking Symbols Feature will be triggered.
KnockoutRichesPayoutAndRulesShared.BodyStackingSymbolsFeature2: At the end of the 3rd round, the values above reels 2, 3 and 4 will be set as 1.
KnockoutRichesPayoutAndRulesShared.BodyStackingSymbolsFeature3: Starting from the 4th round onwards, any winning symbols on reels 2, 3, and/or 4 will increase the respective reel's value by an amount equal to the number of winning symbols on that reel.
KnockoutRichesPayoutAndRulesShared.BodyStackingSymbolsFeature4: At the end of the spin, both reel 1 and 5 will be transformed into a single randomly chosen symbol (excluding Wild symbol and Scatter symbol), and reel 2, 3 and 4 will be filled with a stacked amount of the chosen symbols equal to the value above the reels before wins are paid.
KnockoutRichesPayoutAndRulesShared.BodyStackingSymbolsFeature5: The maximum value above reels 2, 3 and 4 is 20.
KnockoutRichesPayoutAndRulesShared.BodyFreeSpinFeature1: 2 Scatter symbols appearing anywhere will trigger the Free Spins Feature with 5 free spins. Each additional Scatter symbol will trigger 5 more free spins.
KnockoutRichesPayoutAndRulesShared.BodyFreeSpinFeature2: At the start of the Free Spins Feature, the values above reels 2, 3 and 4 will be set as 1.
KnockoutRichesPayoutAndRulesShared.BodyFreeSpinFeature3: During the Free Spins Feature, any winning symbols on reels 2, 3, and/or 4 will increase the respective reel's value by an amount equal to the number of winning symbols on that reel.
KnockoutRichesPayoutAndRulesShared.BodyFreeSpinFeature4: At the end of the Free Spins Feature, both reel 1 and 5 will be transformed into a single randomly chosen symbol (excluding Wild symbol and Scatter symbol), and reel 2, 3 and 4 will be filled with a stacked amount of the chosen symbols equal to the value above the reels before wins are paid.
KnockoutRichesPayoutAndRulesShared.BodyFreeSpinFeature5: The maximum value above reels 2, 3 and 4 is 20.
KnockoutRichesPayoutAndRulesShared.BodyMaximumWin1: The maximum win amount is %{10000}x of the bet amount.
KnockoutRichesPayoutAndRulesShared.BodyMaximumWin2: If the total win in the main game or the Free Spins Feature reaches %{10000}x of the bet amount, the spin ends.
KnockoutRichesPayoutAndRulesShared.GeneralRulesPayoutValue1: Wild symbol substitutes for all symbols except Scatter symbol.
KnockoutRichesPayoutAndRulesShared.GeneralRulesPayoutValue2: Wild symbol appears on reels 2, 3 and 4 only.
KnockoutRichesPayoutAndRulesShared.GeneralRulesPayoutValue3: After the payout of every round is made, all winning symbols will explode, allowing the symbols above them to cascade down for a new round.
KnockoutRichesPayoutAndRulesShared.GeneralRulesPayoutValue4: Additional winning combination will be tallied in every round until no more winning combination can be tallied.

KnockoutRichesRules.GeneralRules1: Knockout Riches is a 5-reels (1 to 3 rows in reel 1 and 5, 4 to 20 rows in reels 2, 3 and 4) video slot featuring stacking symbols.

GeneralRules2.value: The game is played with 20 base bet for %{1} way - %{8000} ways, bet level of %{minBetMtp} to %{maxBetMtp} and bet size of %{minChip} to %{maxChip}.
GeneralRules2.comment: %{minBetMtp}, %{maxBetMtp}, %{minChip}, %{maxChip} will be minimum bet level, maximum max level, minimum bet size and maximum bet size in numeric form. %{1} and %{8000} are numbers that needs to be formatted
GeneralRules2.example: The game is played with 20 base bet for 1 way - 8,000 ways, bet level of 1 to 10 and bet size of 0.05 to 50.

KnockoutRichesRules.GeneralRules3: Free Spins Feature is played at the same bet size and bet level as the spin that triggered the Free Spins Feature.
